author: hollowstrawberry
description: Restores the current audio track progress when the bot restarts. It also reconnects to voice channels even if there weren't any tracks currently playing. Depends on Audio's persist_queue setting, which normally only preserves the queue and not the current track.
install_msg:
🛜 __**AudioReconnect**__ ```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load audioreconnect
2. The current audio track's progress will automatically be restored after a bot restart on all guilds where Audio's persist_queue is enabled.```
short: Restores the current audio track progress when the bot restarts.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
